title: PodGroup API — What's next
text:
Learn about the
PodGroup lifecycle
in detail.
Read about the
Workload API
that provides PodGroupTemplates.
See how Pods reference their PodGroup via the
scheduling group
field.
Understand the
gang scheduling
algorithm.

Was this page helpful?
Thanks for the feedback. If you have a specific, answerable question about how to use Kubernetes, ask it on
Stack Overflow
.
Open an issue in the
GitHub Repository
if you want to
report a problem
or
suggest an improvement
.
